title: Autoscribe Runtime State
description: GitHub-native runtime state for an Autoscribe docs site, committed at `.autoscribe/state.json` in the docs repo. This is the ONLY persistent state Autoscribe keeps — there is no database. Git history is the free, auditable timeline of every run. The Action has write access and rewrites this file at the end of each run.

$schema.description: Optional pointer to this schema for editor IntelliSense.

version.description: State file format version, for forward-compatible migrations.

cursor.description: High-water mark of progress through the watched repo's merged PRs. The scheduled-poll fallback uses this to find newly-merged PRs since the last run; the webhook-dispatch path advances it as PRs are processed.

lastProcessedPr.description: PR number of the most recently processed merged PR in the watched repo. `null` before the first run.

lastProcessedMergedAt.description: `merged_at` timestamp (ISO 8601, UTC) of the most recently processed PR. Used as the poll lower-bound so PRs merged out of numeric order are not missed.

queue.description: Work queue: one entry per merged watched-repo PR awaiting or undergoing processing. Mirrors the reference pipeline's per-PR queue. Processed terminal entries may be pruned to keep the file small (the runLog retains the audit trail).

status.description: Lifecycle state of this PR's documentation work. Lifecycle: queued -> in_progress -> no_gap | drafted | published. `queued` = waiting; `in_progress` = being analyzed/edited this run; `no_gap` = analyzed, no doc change needed (cheap common path); `drafted` = doc edits committed to the rolling Draft PR branch, awaiting human review; `published` = the doc-update PR was merged.

gapType.description: Optional classification from the analyze pass, retained for the dashboard feed. Ported from the reference's findings taxonomy.

docPr.description: Number of the doc-update PR (in THIS docs repo) this work landed in, once drafted/published.

updatedAt.description: ISO 8601 timestamp of the last status change for this entry.

runLog.description: Append-only log of Action runs. Becomes the user's dashboard feed. Ported from the reference pipeline's runLogs table.

runId.description: Unique identifier for this run (e.g. timestamp + short random suffix, or the GitHub Actions run id).

prsAnalyzed.description: How many PRs the run classified.

gapsFound.description: How many of those PRs were classified as a documentation gap (status drafted/published rather than no_gap).

docsChanged.description: How many markdown/MDX files the run created or edited.

errors.description: Count of errors encountered during the run.

spendUSD.description: Optional observed/estimated Anthropic spend for this run, in USD. Compared against config.spendCeilingUSD.

stoppedReason.description: Optional reason the run ended early, if it did.

at.description: ISO 8601 timestamp when the run finished.

sourcePr.description: PR number in the watched repo that triggered this run.

docPr.description: Number of the rolling draft PR in this docs repo that received the edits from this run.

pagesTouched.description: Doc file paths created or edited during this run.

summary.description: One-line human-readable summary of the documentation change, from the agent's classification.
